publishDecision.summary: Trump administration defends Anthropic blacklisting in US court looks like the stronger lead today.
leadStrengths: The story is still fresh enough for a morning-led publish.
The story has multiple AI-specific signals, not just one loose keyword.
leadRisks: Axios is not on the trusted-source list, so the lead needs stronger verification.
The story still reads like a broad industry shift, which can lead to vague content if not tightened.
backupStrengths: Reuters is treated as a trusted source for the morning stack.
The story is recent enough to stay usable today.
The story has multiple AI-specific signals, not just one loose keyword.
policy signal stories are easier to explain clearly than broad industry-shift headlines.
